target_audience: Commission agents (Dalals) in Indian livestock wholesale markets. Need clear readable numbers, fast data entry, bilingual support.

design_directions.name: The 'Bahi Khata' Modernist (Earthy & Grounded)
design_directions.concept: Bridges traditional Indian accounting books (Bahi Khata) with modern SaaS. Feels grounded, physical, and highly trustworthy for traditional traders.

colors.primary_description: Terracotta Red (inspired by traditional ledger covers)

typography.numbers: IBM Plex Mono (Crucial for aligning tabular ₹ amounts)

design_directions.layout_and_ui: Neumorphic-lite. Soft paper-like shadows, generous padding (p-6/p-8). Cards have slightly rounded corners (rounded-lg).
design_directions.best_for: Older generations of traders who are transitioning from paper to digital.

design_directions.name: The 'Mandi Terminal' (High-Contrast & Dense)
design_directions.concept: Built for speed, high data density, and outdoor readability (sunlight). Prioritizes raw functionality and sharp contrast.
design_directions.layout_and_ui: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). Dense UI (p-3/p-4). Visible grid lines, 1px solid borders, zero shadows. High utilization of screen real estate.
design_directions.best_for: Power users processing hundreds of entries a day; users working outdoors in bright light.

design_directions.name: The 'Dalal Premium' (Jewel & Trust)
design_directions.concept: Elevates the Dalal's status. Feels like a premium corporate banking app. Darker accents communicate security and established wealth.
design_directions.layout_and_ui: Glassmorphism headers, crisp solid white cards with subtle ambient shadows. Gold/Bronze accents for primary CTAs.
design_directions.best_for: Large-scale commission agents wanting to impress Bepaaris with a highly professional setup.

design_directions.name: The 'Clear Khisa' (Soft & Approachable)
design_directions.concept: Reduces the cognitive load and stress of accounting. Large, friendly interfaces, distinct color-coding for different transaction types.
design_directions.layout_and_ui: Generous spacing (p-8), large pill-shaped buttons, rounded cards (rounded-xl), clear distinct pastel backgrounds for different states.
design_directions.best_for: Agents using mobile devices predominantly, needing fat-finger-friendly touch targets.

universal_ui_ux_guidelines.1: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Tint neutrals slightly (e.g. Slate or Zinc in Tailwind).
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.2: All monetary values must be right-aligned in tables and use a Monospace font to ensure decimal points align vertically.
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.4: Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.5: Do not use completely transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, sticky headers, or dialogs. Always use solid or heavily blurred (backdrop-blur-xl) backgrounds.
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.6: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='daily-sales-submit').
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.7: Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Tables, Dialogs, Select), but customize them to break the generic 'Vercel' look.
universal_ui_ux_guidelines.8: Design must be fully responsive, heavily prioritizing mobile (80vh max height for images/modals on mobile).

instructions_to_main_agent: Present the 4 design directions to the user clearly with their philosophies and color palettes.
Ask the user which direction they prefer (1, 2, 3, or 4).
Do NOT start coding the application components until the user has selected a design direction.
Once a direction is selected, update this JSON to reflect ONLY the chosen direction and proceed with implementation.
